name: MetaMask
description: Most widely used browser extension and mobile wallet for Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains.

name: Phantom
description: Multi-chain crypto wallet popular on Solana with support for Ethereum and Bitcoin.

name: Rabby
description: Multi-chain EVM wallet with pre-transaction security checks and seamless chain switching.

name: Trust Wallet
description: Multi-chain mobile wallet by Binance supporting 100+ blockchains and in-app swaps.

name: Coinbase Wallet
description: Self-custody crypto wallet by Coinbase with dApp browser and multi-chain support.

name: Rainbow
description: User-friendly Ethereum wallet with colorful UI, ENS support, and NFT display.

name: Backpack
description: Multi-chain wallet and xNFT platform for Solana and Ethereum ecosystems.

name: Exodus
description: Multi-asset desktop and mobile wallet with built-in exchange and portfolio tracking.

name: Brave Wallet
description: Browser-native crypto wallet built into Brave supporting Ethereum, Solana, and Filecoin.

name: OKX Wallet
description: Multi-chain wallet by OKX supporting 80+ chains with DEX aggregation and DeFi access.

name: Keplr
description: Leading wallet for the Cosmos ecosystem supporting IBC transfers and staking.

name: Solflare
description: Non-custodial Solana wallet with staking, NFT management, and hardware wallet support.

name: Unisat
description: Bitcoin wallet and marketplace for BRC-20 tokens and Ordinals inscriptions.

name: Xverse
description: Bitcoin wallet supporting Ordinals, BRC-20, Stacks, and Bitcoin DeFi applications.

name: Ledger
description: Hardware wallet manufacturer offering secure cold storage devices for cryptocurrency assets.

name: Trezor
description: Pioneer hardware wallet brand providing open-source cold storage for crypto assets.

name: GridPlus Lattice1
description: Hardware wallet with touchscreen and SafeCard system for secure key storage.

name: Keystone
description: Air-gapped hardware wallet using QR codes for transaction signing without USB or Bluetooth.

name: NGRAVE
description: Air-gapped hardware wallet with biometric verification and metal backup seed solution.

name: Tangem
description: Card-shaped NFC hardware wallet for simple and portable cryptocurrency cold storage.

name: Safe
description: Leading multi-signature smart contract wallet securing over $100B in digital assets.

name: Squads
description: Multisig and smart account platform for Solana with treasury management features.

name: Fireblocks
description: Institutional digital asset custody platform using MPC technology for secure key management.

name: Copper
description: Institutional digital asset infrastructure with MPC custody and prime brokerage services.

name: Fordefi
description: Institutional MPC wallet with hardware-isolated policy engine and multi-chain support.

name: Liminal
description: Digital asset custody platform with MPC and multisig wallets for institutional security.

name: ZeroDev
description: Account abstraction SDK for building smart wallets with gas sponsorship and batched transactions.

name: Biconomy
description: Account abstraction toolkit enabling gasless transactions and smart account infrastructure.

name: Argent
description: Smart contract wallet for Ethereum and StarkNet with social recovery and no seed phrase.

name: Ambire
description: Smart wallet with email login, gas abstraction, and cross-chain account management.
